# makeoptions WITH_CTF=1
makeoptions: Command not found.

# grep -i "WITH_CTF" /etc/src.conf
WITH_CTF=true

dtrace: failed to establish error handler: "/usr/lib/dtrace/psinfo.d", line 2: type redeclared: struct dev                      info
